generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
Move implementation-level references to the implementation annex.
Avoid range comparisons or equality checks on Boolean or opaque data ports unless a numeric scalar representation is available.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure all AGREE references use visible AADL features or declared helpers.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model dependencies.
Avoid adding architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on correcting the contract itself.
